name: Orin
description: A hospital porter in scrubs and rubber boots, writing on a strip of tape by lantern-light before he wheels another covered gurney out to the yard.
background: Worked the hospital's mortuary and portering the graveyard shift; he has moved more of the dead than anyone left alive.
personality: Quiet, unhurried, and oddly at peace among the dead — courteous to the living, tender with the gone.
secret: He will not let one of them go into the ground unnamed — he matches each unclaimed face to a scar, a ring, a half-remembered visit, until he knows who they were.
notes: T45 · Mercy Hospital. Skill: mortuary/medical logistics. Hook: restoring names to the anonymous dead is a Humanity/memorial thread; he knows the hospital's dead ends and drug stores.
